transcript: 藢d蕭忙k 蓹v 蓴l 藞tre瑟dz
definitions: A person who is good at many different things.
A person who has many skills and can turn their hand to a variety of tasks.
examples: He's a real jack-of-all-trades around the house.
She's a jack-of-all-trades in the office, handling everything from IT to marketing.
